title: Piquant Gooey Tunisian Eggplant Tagine
description: A traditional Tunisian dish featuring eggplant, cider vinegar, and a rich, jammy sauce, this tagine is a vegetarian-friendly delight that is both nostalgic and flavorful.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is softened and lightly browned.
Add the minced garlic and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Add the cubed eggplant and cook, stirring occasionally, until it is tender and lightly browned.
Stir in the cider vinegar, tomato paste, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the water to the pot and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake the tagine, covered, for 30 minutes, then remove the cover and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened and the eggplant is very tender.
